name: User Registration
description: Email/password registration with BCrypt hashing and JWT token generation

name: User Login
description: Email/password authentication with constant-time comparison and JWT token issuance

name: Token Refresh
description: Refresh access tokens to maintain active sessions without re-authentication

name: Centralized Exception Handling
description: Global middleware for consistent error responses, no stack traces to clients, full server-side logging

name: Centralized Logging System
description: Structured JSON logging with correlation IDs for request tracing, excludes sensitive data

name: Circuit Breaker Pattern
description: Fault tolerance for external dependencies with CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN state transitions

name: Swagger/OpenAPI Documentation
description: Auto-generated API documentation at /docs and /openapi.json with example requests/responses

name: Health Check Endpoints
description: Liveness (/health/live) and readiness (/health/ready) probes for monitoring

name: User Profile Management
description: View and update user profile (name, email immutable) for authenticated users

name: User Account Deactivation
description: Soft delete user account with password confirmation, prevents login but preserves data

name: Input Validation Framework
description: Field-level validation for email, password, name with field-specific error messages

name: Role-Based Access Control
description: USER/ADMIN roles with authorization enforcement, user can only access own profile

name: JWT Token Management
description: Token generation, validation, signature verification with HS256/RS256 algorithms

name: Database Persistence
description: Relational database storage with connection pooling, soft deletes, and audit timestamps

name: Configuration Management
description: Environment variable-based configuration with dev/prod profiles, no hardcoded secrets

name: Entity Audit Trail
description: Auto-managed created_at and updated_at timestamps on all user records

name: Request/Response Logging
description: Log all HTTP requests with method, path, status, response time, and correlation ID

name: Security Hardening
description: SQL injection prevention, XSS protection, CORS configuration, constant-time comparisons

name: Performance Optimization
description: Database query optimization, response time monitoring, connection pooling
